name: io.github.201924611/reinsman
description: Self-hosted agent harness: hand it one goal and a resident orchestrator executes it autonomously (sub-agents, verify loop, tracing + LLM-judge evals). Tools: submit_goal, get_task, list_tasks.

environment_variables.name: REINSMAN_URL
environment_variables.description: Base URL of the running reinsman server (default http://127.0.0.1:8848)
